cases.label: Policy rumor should downgrade to noise

actual.body: A hearing headline is moving fast, but there is no confirmed proposal that changes current procurement policy. Most of the urgency looks narrative-driven, not operational.

heuristicBaseline.body: A hearing headline is moving fast, but there is no confirmed proposal that changes current procurement policy. Most of the urgency looks narrative-driven, not operational.

cases.label: Channel check should map to accelerator cluster

actual.body: Board checks still point to hyperscalers pulling forward AI rack deployments into next quarter. That keeps upstream semi orders tighter than the market narrative implies.

heuristicBaseline.body: Board checks still point to hyperscalers pulling forward AI rack deployments into next quarter. That keeps upstream semi orders tighter than the market narrative implies.

cases.label: Enterprise AI commentary should stay mixed

actual.body: Enterprise buyers are talking AI copilots again, but budget owners still want proof of ROI before expanding seats. Demand tone is better, conversion is still lumpy.

heuristicBaseline.body: Enterprise buyers are talking AI copilots again, but budget owners still want proof of ROI before expanding seats. Demand tone is better, conversion is still lumpy.

cases.label: Crypto desk note should remain cautious

actual.body: BTC is catching some of the same liquidity bid as AI beta, but derivatives positioning is no longer clean. Good backdrop, messy trigger.

heuristicBaseline.body: BTC is catching some of the same liquidity bid as AI beta, but derivatives positioning is no longer clean. Good backdrop, messy trigger.

cases.label: Macro semis context should confirm accelerators

actual.body: Rates are not the story this week. Risk appetite is broadening and semis are leading again; that's a better backdrop for continuation than for fading strength.

heuristicBaseline.body: Rates are not the story this week. Risk appetite is broadening and semis are leading again; that's a better backdrop for continuation than for fading strength.

cases.label: Supply chain tightness should map to infrastructure

actual.body: Supply chain chatter still says liquid-cooled AI rack components are tight. That is usually not what you see when capex appetite is about to roll over.

heuristicBaseline.body: Supply chain chatter still says liquid-cooled AI rack components are tight. That is usually not what you see when capex appetite is about to roll over.

cases.label: Verification without paper trail should be not actionable

actual.body: The loud procurement rumor going around X still has no attached draft language or committee backing. Treat the move as narrative until evidence appears.

heuristicBaseline.body: The loud procurement rumor going around X still has no attached draft language or committee backing. Treat the move as narrative until evidence appears.

cases.label: Operator tone improvement should not force buy

actual.body: Plenty of AI demo energy, but most enterprise buyers are still separating workflow value from showpiece features. Good for attention, not enough for a clean BUY on its own.

heuristicBaseline.body: Plenty of AI demo energy, but most enterprise buyers are still separating workflow value from showpiece features. Good for attention, not enough for a clean BUY on its own.

cases.label: Spot demand with loud perps should remain crypto risk

actual.body: Spot demand is fine, but perp positioning is getting louder than the underlying flow. That usually keeps me from upgrading BTC from constructive to aggressive.

heuristicBaseline.body: Spot demand is fine, but perp positioning is getting louder than the underlying flow. That usually keeps me from upgrading BTC from constructive to aggressive.

cases.label: Growth rotation note should stay broad and mixed

actual.body: If growth leadership keeps rotating back toward software without a rates scare, QQQ stays supported, but semis still have the cleaner social-signal setup.

heuristicBaseline.body: If growth leadership keeps rotating back toward software without a rates scare, QQQ stays supported, but semis still have the cleaner social-signal setup.
